StructurePhase.Reference: Ramussen S.E., Lundtoft B., Powder Diffr., v2 p29 (1987)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO2. LPF Collection Code: 534044. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Mo,Ru. Compound Preparation: induction-melted. Article Title: New Crystal Data for Mo.63Ru.37 (Mo5Ru3) A Superconducting Sigma Phase. Wyckoff Sequence: j i2 g a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
